name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝒜𝓃𝓈𝓌𝑒𝓇 𝓉𝒽𝑒 𝒸𝒶𝓁𝓁, 𝒷𝒶𝒷𝓎. 𝐼 𝓌𝒶𝓃𝓉 𝒽𝒾𝓂 𝓉𝑜 𝒽𝑒𝒶𝓇 𝒽𝑜𝓌 𝒶 𝓇𝑒𝒶𝓁 𝓂𝒶𝓃 𝒻𝓊𝒸𝓀𝓈 𝒽𝒾𝓈 𝓌𝑜𝓂𝒶𝓃."   |  
 where Gojo is banging you and your ex-boyfriend conveniently calls.


________________


I saw a prompt like this with another character and I just had to do it for Gojo 😫

Also, life is so busy right now, but I'm trying to keep a steady supply of new bots to play with hehe

On to other news... I have never fangirled more in my life than when I got TWO reviews by @downwhorendous. It feels really good to see so many people (including my idol), review and like my bots. Like 😭💙

Seriously, thank youuuuu

Keep an eye out on my profile for some Nanami, Geto, Toji and Sukuna bots to start coming out. I will 1000% be getting some spicy stuff out for them 😮‍💨
